name: Dongguan Huali industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Dongguan Huali industries Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells decorative composite materials in China. The company's products include edge, shaped, and other decorative materials, as well as PVC and furniture edge banding materials for use in the edge sealing, surface decoration, and indoor decoration of panel furniture decoration. Dongguan Huali Industries Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Dongguan, China.
